cast.name: 埃斯梅拉达·皮门特尔 Esmeralda Pimentel

introduction: “Heartless” narrates a series of mysterious disappearances startling Madrid’s high society. An unknown criminal is on the loose, slaughtering rich men in a twisted game played to death.Judge Lucia Vergara oversees the case, and only Haro – a character first seen in “Parot” thriller series – a man Lucía imprisoned 10 years ago, understands the minds of dangerous criminals like him. Lucia will team up with Haro unwillingly to stop the killer at all cost, but little does she know that the sophisticated but brutal aristocrat, is actually plotting a vendetta against the judge who sent him down by law.
